feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Integration Suite
feed.subtitle: SAP Integration Suite Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Handling Failed API Calls and Retry Mechanism in SAP Integration Suite
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have an interface where we send bulk data from SAP ECC to a third-party API via SAP Integration Suite. When multiple API calls are triggered simultaneously, some of them fail as the third-party system doesn’t return the expected response. This causes the related IDocs to fail in SAP ECC.

Is there any recommended way to handle this scenario in SAP Integration Suite, such as implementing a retry mechanism or any other approach to manage failed API calls effectively?

entry.title: Posting Journal Entries with alternative accounts in SAP Public Cloud / S4 via API
entry.content:
Hello,

I've setup a correct JE entry transaction sending from an external system to a customer SAP S4 Cloud Public Edition, and I'm using this standard SAP API to integrate JE transactions into SAP via XML data:

Journal Entry - Post (Synchronous)

https://api.sap.com/api/JOURNALENTRYCREATEREQUESTCONFI/overview

However, since customer uses an alternative chart of accounts in SAP due to country financial requirements, it requested to change the integration to use alternative accounts instead of internal SAP accounts.

Is there any way to send these alternative accounts in the Journal Entry - Post (Synchronous) XML message?

Currently I'm using the XML tag <GLAccount> to send the internal SAP JE accounts but could find any tag to send alternative accounts...

Thanks

entry.title: Receiving 997 functional acknowledgement in SAP with TPM in CPI
entry.content:
Hi Experts
From B2B partner we are receiving 997 functional acknowledgement to CPI , but we dont find any option to route this through mapping to the ECC system. Any inputs will be highly appreciated.Thanks

entry.title: MDI adapter in CPI
entry.content:
Hi,

How do I use a MDI adapter in CPI to query the company codes in MDI? I am trying something as below, the request is successful but the output isn't a list of company codes.


API response

If not this approach, how else can we check if data is available in MDI?

Regards,
Indu

entry.title: Jira Attachment API redirecting to other location - Error Code 303
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am working on JIRA integration and when I am trying to get an attachment using API call, it is working fine with POSTMAN but failing in SAP CPI with the error details mentioned below -

Error Details
org.apache.camel.component.ahc.AhcOperationFailedException: HTTP operation failed invoking https://XXXatlassian.net/rest/api/2/attachment/content/26531 with statusCode: 303, redirectLocation: https://api.media.atlassian.com/file/c3919937-9836-44d8-97c4-756fc4e6ded1/binary?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJjZDU5MTg1Mi1hNzRlLTQ4OTQtYTAwYi1kZjAxODcyOGYwMjciLCJhY2Nlc3MiOnsidXJuOmZpbGVzdG9yZTpmaWxlOmMzOTE5OTM3LTk4MzYtNDRkOC05N2M0LTc1NmZjNGU2ZGVkMSI6WyJyZWFkIl19LCJleHAiOjE3Mzg4MzgyNDYsIm5iZiI6MTczODgzNzY0Nn0.hfd1Cm-iw5tg0e1HmXid9GnfDoLOniNCT3jMwyNdNVo&client=cd591852-a74e-4894-a00b-df018728f027&dl=true&name=image.jpg

POSTMAN Call-

Please suggest if I am doing something wrong and any resolution suggested.

Thanks,

Nidhi Srivastava

entry.title: IDoc failed with error status 02 in SAP S4, when one receiver adapter failed in SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hi Team,

we are migrating the SAP PO to SAP CPI, The sender idoc failed in SAP S4 with the error status 02.

Scenario : The IDoc goes to multiple receivers, when one of the receiver comm channel failed due to port or server issues the idoc is getting failed in S4 and the message is not processing to other 2 comm channels(Receiver 1 & Receiver2).

we tried by using the 'Send' setp as well but didnt worked.

please let us know how to handle/suppress the http response codes in SAP CPI.

If one of the receiver comm channel(Receiver 3) failed to process , the message should go to other 2 receiver comm channels(Recevier 1 & Receiver 2). It shouldn't block the business process to other systems.

 

Thanks,

Ravi M

 

How to handle the http error status code

entry.title: Unable to post form-data to Rest API
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am trying to post the data to Jira API form-data and it is working fine with POSTMAN but it is failing while posting through SAP CPI. The data is posted in binary format.

I compared the payload from POSTMAN and CPI and found that there are 2 content-type parameters while posting from POSTMAN but only one I am using in SAP CPI.

SAP CPI Logs

POST /rest/api/3/issue/SNTSTPRJ-86/attachments HTTP/1.1

SAP-PASSPORT: 
Authorization: Basic am9uYXRoYW4uY29ib0BicmlkZ2VzdG9uZS5ldTpBVEFUVDN4RmZHRjBUSjRVSXRORXFQYTZpQUc1RFUzeGJTM0tCQXRka0NjVW12U1p1VjZ4M3RwT3ZfYzFTOHBBVnFXWGpBaEVyRU1KcDVqY2t2ZWJrY2NDQmdsOUZ4LVRRWnk3ZmFIRXIwb2FSR2sxTjhaSlFjMWRtMWZtUEdOYzFGcm5zLVZIaUxRaXVLd29UN2lpVFFQVU1zLWFFUXc5YzE0b1ZJaW5seFVsOVJlQW1Cd21UeGs9MjQzOTRFNjk=
Content-Type: multipart/form-data; boundary="----=_Part_1_1515682674.1738677903765"
content-length: 58090
host: XXX.cloud
accept: */*
X-Atlassian-Token: no-check
user-agent: AHC/2.1

------=_Part_1_1515682674.1738677903765
Content-Disposition: form-data; name="files"; filename=img.jpg

ÿØÿà JFIF  ÿÛ C 


------=_Part_1_1515682674.1738677903765--

POSTMAN Logs

POST /rest/api/3/issue/SNTSTPRJ-86/attachments HTTP/1.1
Content-Type: multipart/form-data
X-Atlassian-Token: no-check
Authorization: Basic am9uYXRoYW4uY29ib0BicmlkZ2VzdG9uZS5ldTpBVEFUVDN4RmZHRjBUSjRVSXRORXFQYTZpQUc1RFUzeGJTM0tCQXRka0NjVW12U1p1VjZ4M3RwT3ZfYzFTOHBBVnFXWGpBaEVyRU1KcDVqY2t2ZWJrY2NDQmdsOUZ4LVRRWnk3ZmFIRXIwb2FSR2sxTjhaSlFjMWRtMWZtUEdOYzFGcm5zLVZIaUxRaXVLd29UN2lpVFFQVU1zLWFFUXc5YzE0b1ZJaW5seFVsOVJlQW1Cd21UeGs9MjQzOTRFNjk=
User-Agent: PostmanRuntime/7.43.0
Accept: */*
Cache-Control: no-cache
Postman-Token: a46830c7-dca1-468f-8be9-89f4e4c0ff27
Host: stvdb.cloud
Accept-Encoding: gzip, deflate, br
Connection: keep-alive
Content-Length: 58171

------WebKitFormBoundaryg2Jp9KV0wI4r9vsG
Content-Disposition: form-data; name="11"; filename="./cloudFiles/B9dPltR3Q/CallActivity_971031.body"
Content-Type: application/octet-stream

ÿØÿà JFIF  ÿÛ C

------WebKitFormBoundaryg2Jp9KV0wI4r9vsG--

POSTMAN is working fine, but while triggering from SAP CPI 500 internal server error is coming.

Please suggest.

Thanks,

Nidhi Srivastava

entry.title: Restrict API access to Postman or any other sender
entry.content:
Hi,

We developed API using Integration Suite, gave Production OAuth credentials to Calling system. 

They used the details and configured it in their Dev, QA, Mock and Production systems.

How do I restrict accessing the API based on the sender?, even Postman.

Otherwise, anyone with Credentials can access business data.

Thank you for your help.

entry.title: SAP Integration Suite - Basic Edition Activation
entry.content:
Dear All

We have integration suite - basic edition with 10000 messages as part of license.

When activating integration suite, we are getting only below mentioned options:

  •  free (Application) for 90 Days 
  • edge_integration_cell
  • enterprise_agreement (Application)
  • Integration Suite Messages

We selected the enterpise_agreement but SAP sent us a bill as it activated the SAP Integration Suite - Standard Edition whereas no option to select Basic Edition is appearing.

Can anyone support to resolve below mentioned queries.

  1. How to activate SAP Integration Suite - Basic Edition as no option is appearing.
  2. How to reverse the bill as apparently a wrong option is selected but we didn't use any functionality of Integration suite.

entry.title: "Configure" menu not visible in Integration Suite when using trial account
entry.content:
I am a newbie to SAP and I am following the tutorial on 'Developing with SAP Integration Suite'. I followed all the steps (I think), but I am unable to see the "Configure" under the menu bar in the left side. Could you please let me know what am I missing ?

I have added all the capabilities to the Integration Suite and also added the Administrator roles for my account, but still this configure option not coming up.

entry.title: [SAP Cloud Integration-Groovy]: Filtering Personal Information in CompoundEmployee Payload
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I need to ensure that the personal_information section is included in the payload only when there is a Hire, Rehire, or Subsidiary Transfer event or if any delta changes have been made to the personal_information portlet. Otherwise, this section should be filtered out before further processing via message mapping.

The relevant events can be identified using the following XPaths:

queryCompoundEmployeeResponse/CompoundEmployee/person/employment_information/job_information/event='H'
queryCompoundEmployeeResponse/CompoundEmployee/person/employment_information/job_information/event='R'
queryCompoundEmployeeResponse/CompoundEmployee/person/employment_information/job_information/event='6'

Currently, I have implemented this logic using two Groovy scripts, but I am looking for an optimized single Groovy script solution to achieve the same outcome.

I would appreciate any guidance or alternative approaches to accomplish this efficiently.

First Groovy Script:

import com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.Message;
import java.util.HashMap;
import groovy.xml.XmlUtil;
import groovy.util.XmlParser;
import groovy.util.Node;
import groovy.xml.MarkupBuilder;
import java.text.SimpleDateFormat; 
import java.util.Date;

def Message processData(Message message) {

	def body = message.getBody(Reader)
	def Root = new XmlParser().parse(body)
	def parent = "";
	def action = "";
    map = message.getProperties();
	
	def Iflow_LSRD = map.get("interfaceLastRunTime").substring(0,10);

    SimpleDateFormat sdf = new SimpleDateFormat("yyyy-MM-dd");
    Date LSRD = sdf.parse(Iflow_LSRD);
	
	Root.CompoundEmployee.each {CE ->
		CE.person.employment_information.job_information.each{JOB ->
			action = JOB.action.text();
            event = JOB.event.text();
            event_reason = JOB.event_reason.text();
			event_previous = JOB.event_previous.text();
			event_reason_previous = JOB.event_reason_previous.text();
			emplStatus_previous = JOB.emplStatus_previous.text();
			
			last_modified_on = JOB.last_modified_on.text().substring(0,10);
            Date LMD = sdf.parse(last_modified_on);
			
			if(((event == 'H') && (LMD >= LSRD)) || ((event == 'R') && (LMD >= LSRD)) || ((event == 'GA') && (LMD >= LSRD)))
			{
				CE.appendNode("EventFlag", "X");
			}
			action =  "";
		}
	}
	message.setBody(XmlUtil.serialize(Root));
	return message;
}

Second Groovy Script:

import com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.Message;
import java.util.HashMap;
import groovy.xml.XmlUtil;
import groovy.util.XmlParser;
import groovy.util.Node;
import groovy.xml.MarkupBuilder;
import java.text.SimpleDateFormat; 
import java.util.Date;

def Message processData(Message message) {
	def body = message.getBody(Reader)
	def Root = new XmlParser().parse(body)

	def parent = "";
    map = message.getProperties();
	
	def Iflow_LSRD = map.get("interfaceLastRunTime").substring(0,10);
    SimpleDateFormat sdf = new SimpleDateFormat("yyyy-MM-dd");
    Date LSRD = sdf.parse(Iflow_LSRD);
	
	def dnicard_code = "          1";
    def arncard_code = "          6";
    def pascard_code = "          2";

	Root.CompoundEmployee.each {CE ->
		
/*		CE.person.employment_information.job_information.each{JOB ->
			action = JOB.action.text();
            event = JOB.event.text();
            event_reason = JOB.event_reason.text();
			event_previous = JOB.event_previous.text();
			event_reason_previous = JOB.event_reason_previous.text();
			emplStatus_previous = JOB.emplStatus_previous.text();
			
			last_modified_on = JOB.last_modified_on.text().substring(0,10);
            Date LMD = sdf.parse(last_modified_on);
			
			if(((event == 'H') && (LMD >= LSRD)) || ((event == 'R') && (LMD >= LSRD)) || ((event == 'GA') && (LMD >= LSRD)))
			{
				CE.appendNode("EventFlag", "X");
			}
			action =  "";
		} */
		def FlagCheck = CE.EventFlag.text();
		CE.person.personal_information.each{PER ->
			
		/*	FlagCheck = PER.parent();
            check = FlagCheck.EventFlag.text(); */
			
			def action = PER.action.text();
			def first_name_previous = PER.first_name_previous.text();
			def last_name_previous = PER.last_name_previous.text();
			def gender_previous = PER.gender_previous.text();
			def salutation_previous = PER.salutation_previous.text();
			def marital_status_previous = PER.marital_status_previous.text();
			def last_modified_on = PER.last_modified_on.text().substring(0,10);
            Date LMD = sdf.parse(last_modified_on);
			if((action == 'INSERT') ||(FlagCheck == 'X') || ((first_name_previous != null ) && (first_name_previous.trim().length() > 0))|| ((last_name_previous != null ) && (last_name_previous.trim().length() > 0)) || ((gender_previous != null ) && (gender_previous.trim().length() > 0))||((salutation_previous != null ) && (salutation_previous.trim().length() > 0))||
			((marital_status_previous != null ) && (marital_status_previous.trim().length() > 0))||
			(LMD >= LSRD))
			{

			}
			else
			{
				parent = PER.parent();
				parent.remove(PER);
				parent = "";
			}
			action =  "";
		}
		
		CE.person.national_id_card.each{NAT ->
			def action = NAT.action.text();
			def card_type = NAT.card_type.text();
			def national_id = NAT.national_id.text();
			def card_type_previous = NAT.card_type_previous.text();
			def national_id_previous = NAT.national_id_previous.text();
			def	last_modified_on_NAT = NAT.last_modified_on.text().substring(0,10);
            Date LMD_NAT = sdf.parse(last_modified_on_NAT);

			if((action == 'INSERT') || ((card_type_previous != null ) && (card_type_previous.trim().length() > 0))|| ((national_id_previous != null ) && (national_id_previous.trim().length() > 0)) || (LMD_NAT >= LSRD))
			{
				if((national_id != '') && (card_type == 'DNI')){
					national_id = national_id.concat(dnicard_code);
                    NAT.appendNode("national_id", national_id);
				}
				if (national_id != '' && card_type == 'NIE'){
					national_id = national_id.concat(arncard_code);
                    NAT.appendNode("national_id", national_id);
				}
				if (national_id != '' && card_type == 'PAS'){
					national_id = national_id.concat(pascard_code);
                    NAT.appendNode("national_id", national_id);
				}
			}
			else
			{
				parent = NAT.parent();
				parent.remove(NAT);
				parent = "";
			}
			action =  "";
		}
	}
	message.setBody(XmlUtil.serialize(Root));
	return message;
}

Regards,
Pavan

entry.title: SAP CPI Message Mapping Issue: Handling Empty & Null CountryCode with Conditional Mapping
entry.content:
Hi,

I am facing an issue with SAP CPI Message Mapping, where I need to control the creation of a Address field based on the CountryCode. The problem arises when CountryCode is null or empty, causing the mapping to fail.

I have tried various Mapping approaches, including ifWithoutElse(), equals(), exists(), and not(), but I still cannot get the desired output in all cases. I am reaching out to see if anyone has encountered a similar issue or can suggest a working solution.

Expected/Actual Behavior

Expected Behavior

CountryCode (Input)Processed CountryCodeOutput

"NO""NO"false
"SE""SE"true
"" (empty)"Empty"true
null"Empty"true
"US""US"true

This means:

  • The output should always be true unless CountryCode = "NO", in which case it should return false.
  • If CountryCode is null or "" (empty), it might be converted to "Empty" in order to be processed (not sure if this is the most effective approach) but still always return true.

Actual Behavior

  • When CountryCode is null, the mapping either returns null or does not process correctly.
  • The or() function sometimes receives null instead of true/false, causing failures.
  • Using ifWithoutElse() for CountryCode does not always ensure a valid output.
  • equals(CountryCode, "NO") returns null instead of false when CountryCode is missing.

Current Mapping Approach (Not Working)

I have tried the following Message Mapping functions:

  1. Ensure CountryCode is never null before checking "NO"

    • Using ifWithoutElse(Not(Exists(ns0:CountryCode)), "Empty")

  2. Check if CountryCode is "NO"

    • Using equals(ifWithoutElse(), "NO")

  3. Check if CountryCode is "Empty"

    • Using equals(ifWithoutElse(), "Empty")

  4. Use or() to check if CountryCode is "NO" or "Empty"

    • or(equals("NO"), equals("Empty"))

  5. Use Not(or()) to determine if Address should be created

    • Not(or()) → And() → CreateIf()

Issue

  • equals(ifWithoutElse(), "NO") sometimes returns null instead of false.
  • The or() function does not handle null values properly, causing an empty result.
  • Not(or()) is not always returning the expected true/false values.

Alternative Approaches Tried

1. Groovy Script Attempt (Did Not Work)

We attempted a Groovy script to handle null, "NO", and empty values, but encountered:

  • MissingPropertyException when CountryCode is null.
  • The script still produced null outputs instead of true/false.

2. Using fixContexts(), collapseContexts(), and removeContexts()

  • These functions did not ensure CountryCode was always valid before processing.

3. Using mapWithDefault() or copyValue()

  • These functions did not resolve null values correctly before checking "NO".

Questions

  1. How can I correctly ensure that CountryCode is always processed as a valid string (never null) before checking "NO"? (if this is necessary)
  2. Is there a better way to handle the logic in Message Mapping without requiring Groovy?

I have attached a picture of what i have. The input "CountryCode" as well as the "and" function that "CountryCode" has to be connected to with either the value "true" or "false" depending on the rules stated earlier in this post.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Datadog alert for SAP AEM when there is no topic in a queue
entry.content: I want to create an alert in datadog for sap AEM to check if the queue has topics/Subscription or not and to send alert if topic number in a queue is zero. I looked into Insight metrics checks which are available but wasn't able to find the solution for it.

entry.title: Connecting SAP Integration Suite with Microsoft Dynamics GP & SAP Ariba
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

We are currently in the process of transitioning from the Smart Connector to SAP Integration Suite for integrating with Microsoft Dynamics GP. Previously, the Smart Connector facilitated seamless data exchange, but we are now looking for a more scalable and modern integration approach using SAP’s cloud capabilities.

Additionally, our invoices are managed in SAP Ariba, and we were using the Smart Connector to integrate SAP Ariba with Dynamics GP. As part of this transition, we also need to establish a reliable integration between SAP Ariba and Dynamics GP using SAP Integration Suite.

Key Considerations:
Efficiently replacing Smart Connector’s functionalities within Integration Suite.
Handling real-time or batch data synchronization between SAP, SAP Ariba, and Dynamics GP.
Best practices for authentication, data transformation, and error handling.
Leveraging APIs, event-driven architecture, or middleware for smooth communication.
Ensuring seamless invoice data transfer between SAP Ariba and Dynamics GP.
Questions for the Community:
Is SAP Integration Suite the best option for this migration, or are there alternative approaches we should consider?
Has anyone implemented a similar integration, and if so, what were the key challenges and solutions?
Are there any pre-built connectors, adapters, or accelerators available to simplify this transition?
Any step-by-step guidance or documentation that could help us successfully implement this integration?
Your insights and recommendations would be greatly appreciated! Please help us implement this successfully. Looking forward to your expertise on the best approach for this integration.

Thank you in advance for your guidance!

Best regards,
Changal Rayudu

entry.title: Cloud Integration - Getting the Error 'FAILED to start bundle from path:
entry.content:
Hi Team, 

I am trying to build a POC using the Cloud Integration capability of the Integration Suite using my BTP trial account. 

When I try to deploy my POC, which is pretty much just a timer and a content modifier within nothing in it, I get the following error 

[CONTENT][CONTENT_DEPLOY][RuntimeError] : FAILED to start bundle from path: /app/data/deploy/bundle-pickup/IF_Robotics_to_S4HANA.jar

https://a7600a1ftrial.integrationsuite-trial.cfapps.ap21.hana.ondemand.com/shell/design/contentpackage/AccentureS4HIntegrationwithRobotics/integrationflows/IF_Robotics_to_S4HANA

entry.title: Facing below error Inbound processing in endpoint at /EC_to_ERP_Generic_Object_Query
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

I am facing below error in Standard Replication iFlow in SAP CPI.

Inbound processing in endpoint at /EC_to_ERP_Generic_Object_Query failed with message "NullPointerException:while trying to invoke the method org.apache.catalina.TomcatPrincipal.getUserPrincipal() of a null object loaded from field org.apache.catalina.connector.Request.userPrincipal of an object loaded from local variable 'this'"

Please advice on the root cause and any steps need to be taken?

entry.title: Integration Advisor 1:1 mapping and
entry.content:
Hi experts,

is it possible to create a 1:1 mapping in Integration Advisor and change only one Field on the Target Side.
In SAP PO graphical mapping it was possible to click on a button an the mapping was created.

Or is it possible to use a custom XSLT.

 

I aggree that XSLT is more efficient and easier.
But is it possible ot use XSLT as MAG?
if yes how?

 

the xsl code works fine, but i want to add all other fields an sections 1:1 as easy as possible.

kind regards.

entry.title: Ariba import SupplierTaxRegistration via ITK
entry.content:
Hello,
I want to check anyone was able to successfully import SupplierTaxRegistration file in Ariba via ITK (import batch data) or is there any alternative way to import it via CPI.

entry.title: Xpath not working. I have to retrieve the two fields company code and partner from the below xml .
entry.content:
Xpath not working. I have to retrieve the two fields company code and partner from the below xml . not sure what is incorrect , any help will be highly appreciated

My xml –

<feed xmlns=http://www.w3.org/2005/Atom xmlns:m=http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices/metadata xmlns:d=http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices xml:base=https://ns2ds4app1.sap.global.lmco.com:44400/sap/opu/odata/sap/ZI_SC_AP220_GET_PARTNR_CCD_CDS/><id>https://ns2ds4app1.sap.global.lmco.com:44400/sap/opu/odata/sap/ZI_SC_AP220_GET_PARTNR_CCD_CDS/ZI_SC_AP220_GET_PARTNR_CCD(P_IDNUMBER='954100')/Set</id><title type="text">ZI_SC_AP220_GET_PARTNR_CCDSet</title><updated>2025-02-13T20:45:56Z</updated><author><name/></author><link href="ZI_SC_AP220_GET_PARTNR_CCD(P_IDNUMBER='954100')/Set" rel="self" title="ZI_SC_AP220_GET_PARTNR_CCDSet"/><entry><id>https://ns2ds4app1.sap.global.lmco.com:44400/sap/opu/odata/sap/ZI_SC_AP220_GET_PARTNR_CCD_CDS/ZI_SC_AP220_GET_PARTNR_CCDSet(P_IDNUMBER='954100',IDNUMBER='954100')</id><title type="text">ZI_SC_AP220_GET_PARTNR_CCDSet(P_IDNUMBER='954100',IDNUMBER='954100')</title><updated>2025-02-13T20:45:56Z</updated><category term="ZI_SC_AP220_GET_PARTNR_CCD_CDS.ZI_SC_AP220_GET_PARTNR_CCDType" scheme=http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices/scheme/><link href="ZI_SC_AP220_GET_PARTNR_CCDSet(P_IDNUMBER='954100',IDNUMBER='954100')" rel="self" title="ZI_SC_AP220_GET_PARTNR_CCDType"/><link href="ZI_SC_AP220_GET_PARTNR_CCDSet(P_IDNUMBER='954100',IDNUMBER='954100')/Parameters" rel=http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices/related/Parameters type="application/atom+xml;type=entry" title="Parameters"/><content type="application/xml"><m:properties xmlns:m=http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices/metadata xmlns:d=http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices><d:P_IDNUMBER>954100</d:P_IDNUMBER><d:IDNUMBER>954100</d:IDNUMBER><d:PARTNER>40000</d:PARTNER><d:COMPANYCODE>1000</d:COMPANYCODE></m:properties></content></entry></feed>

XPath –

/feed/entry/content/m:properties/d:COMPANYCODE

/feed/entry/content/m:properties/d:PARTNER

Runtime config- namepace mapping

xmlns:m=http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices/metadata;xmlns:d=http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices;xmlns:p1=http://sap.com/xi/SAPSCORE/SFIN

entry.title: Setup SQI adapter connection to on-oremise SQL DB servers
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

As part of the SAP PI/PO to SAP BTP integration suite migration, I have a requirement to create MS SQL JDBC connection to on-premises MS SQL DB server in SAP Cloud Connector.

I am facing a challenge while creating a connection while following the naming convention as < SQL server >\<DB Instance>.

Please find below details and if anyone had faced such issues, kindly assist and if there is any workaround for this available also would be helpful.

 Business scenario:

Create a MS SQL JDBC connection to on-premises MS SQL DB server when the MS SQL server string is as: <SQL server>\<DB instance>. Example: SDESEQSQL191\SEQ2TEST

Configuration steps:

Create a TCP connection to a non-SAP system in SAP Cloud Connector
Create JDBC Data Source in Integration Suite.
Symptom:

When setting up the Access Control entry in SAP Cloud Connector, in the step to add the internal host and port, SAP Cloud Connector does not allow the naming convention as <SQL server>\<DB instance> throwing the error message below “Invalid or missing input”

SAP cloud connector version is: 2.17.2

Thanks in advance.

Best Regards,

Rakesh Yadav
